docTitle: IBhayibhile ngokuqengqeleka okunye · Ukususela ekudalweni kuse ebandleni

share.title: IBhayibhile ngokuqengqeleka okunye
share.text: Ngokuqengqeleka okunye, fumana ibali elikhulu leBhayibhile — nesizathu sokuza kukaYesu.

s.ui.footer: IBhayibhile ngokuqengqeleka okunye · Iimbalelo zeBhayibhile zithatyathwe kwiIBHAYIBHILE
s.hero.title:
IBhayibhile,
ngokuqengqeleka okunye
s.hero.sub: Ngokuqengqeleka okunye, fumana ibali elikhulu leBhayibhile — nesizathu sokuza kukaYesu.
s.thread.note: UThixo uyathembisa (umnqophiso), abantu balinda ixesha elide, ekugqibeleni yonke into izaliseke ize igqitywe kuYesu. Landela imiboniso eli-13 engezantsi ngolo hlobo — cofa “Funda okungakumbi” kwikhadi ngalinye ukuze ufumane ibali elinzulu.
s.gospel.sublead: Lilibali lendlela uThixo, ngobabalo kuphela, awahlangula ngayo aboni ababengenako ukuzisindisa. Embindini wayo kumi uYesu Krestu.
s.gospel.mirror:
Umjikelo ongapheliyo kaSirayeli ngenene ngumfanekiso “wam”

Unqulo-zithixo→Ukubandezeleka→Ukukhala→UThixo uyahlangula→Unqulo-zithixo kwakhona…

Ukususela kubaGwebi kuse ekuthinjweni, uSirayeli uphinda-phinda lo mjikelo ngokungapheliyo. IBhayibhile ayilibhalanga eli bali ukuze sigculele sisithi, “Babebahlazo kangakanani na.”

Sisipili. Eyona nto iphambili asiyiyo eyokuba “uSirayeli wenza loo nto” kodwa “nam ndenza into efanayo” (1 Korinte 10:11).

Isithixo asingomfanekiso oqingqiweyo kuphela. Yiyo nantoni na esiyithanda okanye esiyithembe ngaphezu kukaThixo — imali, impumelelo, ukwamkelwa, abantu, nokuba ndim kanye. Nokumsebenzisa uThixo njengesixhobo sokuzuza oko ndikufunayo kukunqula-zithixo nako.

Ekugqibeleni, esona sithixo sinzulu ngu “mna, ndihleli etroneni kaThixo.”
s.gospel.coreIntro: Ngoko ke uThixo umsindisa njani umoni onjalo? Nantsi intliziyo yeendaba ezilungileyo ezivakaliswa yiBhayibhile.
s.gospel.crux:
Yonke iBhayibhile ikalatha endaweni enye.

Abantu babengenako ukuwuqhawula ngokwabo umjikelo wesono, kwaye kwakungekho namnye ulilungisa. Ngoko kwakufuneka othile ahlawule ixabiso esikhundleni sabo.

UYesu akazanga nje ukuza kunika imfundiso elungileyo. Ekubeni kwakungekho enye indlela yokundisindisa, wayengenakwenza nto ngaphandle kokuza.

Lowo wayemele ukuxhonywa kuloo mnqamlezo ndim.
UYesu wathwala isono sam wabethelelwa apho esikhundleni sam.

“Phofu ke ungxwelerhwe ngenxa yokukreqa kwethu; ewe, ubulewe ngenxa yobugwenxa bethu … thina sinyangwe ngamanxeba akhe.” — Isaya 53:5
s.faq.q1: ▸ Ngoko ke umbulali kumele nje akholwe aze aye ezulwini, kanti umntu ophile ubomi obulungileyo lonke ixesha kodwa ongakholwayo uya esihogweni?
s.faq.a1:
Ngumbuzo ofanelekileyo. Kodwa kufihlwe iimbono ezimbini eziphosakeleyo ngaphakathi kuwo.

① IBhayibhile ayibahluli abantu ibenza “abalungileyo nababi.” Umlinganiselo asikuko ukuba “ungcono kunalowo umelene naye” kodwa “ubungcwele obugqibeleleyo bukaThixo.” Phambi kwakhe, akukho namnye “olunge ngokwaneleyo” (Roma 3:23). Ngoko le asiyongxaki “yomntu olungileyo ngokuchasene nombulali,” kodwa ngakumbi injengabantu ababini abanesifo esinye esibulalayo — omnye uthatha unyango, omnye uyalukhaba, esithi, “Ndisempilweni engcono kunalo mfo.”

② Yinto enye kuphela eyahlula izulu nesihogo. Ayinakuba ngamanqaku eziganeko, kodwa ukuba ngaba umamkele uYesu Krestu njengeNkosi yaye ingxaki yakho yesono isombululwe na. Lowo isono sakhe sisonjululwe ligazi likaKrestu uya ezulwini; lowo ungazange amamkele, isono sakhe sisahleli, akayi. Akukho zenzo zilungileyo zinokusombulula loo ngxaki yesono ngokwayo.

Ngoko izulu nesihogo asibobuwongo bokuziphatha kakuhle” kodwa ngumcimbi wobudlelwane noKrestu. Yaye “ukukholwa” akukokuvuma ngengqondo kuphela, kodwa lutshintsho lwalowo ulawula ubomi bakho — nabani na omamkela ngokwenene akazi kuziphakamisa, kodwa uguquka ngokunzulu ngakumbi. Eneneni, ukuzigwebela ngokwakho (“ndingumntu olungileyo”) sesona sithixo kunzima ukusiqhawula, eso senza sicinge ukuba asimfuni uKrestu (Luka 18:9-14).

IBhayibhile ikutsho ngokucacileyo: “Lowo uzinikelayo kuNyana kaThixo akagwetywa; kodwa lowo ungazinikeliyo selegwetyiwe” (Yohane 3:18). Umgwebo asikuko “ukulinganisela ubomi bakho emva kokufa,” kodwa sele ugqitywe ngokuya wamamkela na uKrestu.

Roma 3:23 · Yohane 3:18 · Efese 2:8-9 · Luka 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ Andinakuphila nje ubomi obulungileyo ndingakholwa kuYesu?
s.faq.a2:
Yeyona nto icingwa kakhulu, kodwa ayiyiqondi eyona ngxaki yokwenene. Nanku umfanekiso.

Masithi ukhwele kwinqanawa yamasela. Naphi na ukuyicoca kakuhle indawo yokunyathela, ube nobubele kubasebenzi, ube nobomi obungumzekelo — usengummelwane weqela lamasela, kuba uthwalwa nenqanawa uye apho iya khona (izibuko lomgwebo). Ingxaki asikuko “amanqaku okuziphatha” kodwa “ngeyiphi inqanawa oyeyayo” (isazisi sakho).

Ngoko iindaba ezilungileyo azitsho “zama ngamandla ukuba ulunge”; zithi “tshintsha iinqanawa.” Yihla enqanaweni yesono uwele uye kuYesu — kwisazisi esitsha somntwana kaThixo. Oku akukokuphakamisa amanqaku akho ngemigudu, kodwa kukuthemba Lowo welula isandla sakhe uwele uye enqanaweni yakhe.

Eneneni iBhayibhile iyichaza ngokuchanekileyo ngolu hlobo le nsindiso njengoku fudusela — “Wasihlangula egunyeni lobumnyama, waza wasifudusela ekulawulweni nguNyana wakhe oyintanda” (Kolose 1:13).

Musa ukuyiqonda kakubi: oku akuthethi ukuba ubomi obulungileyo abunamsebenzi. Ubulungisa asingomgaqo wensindiso kodwa siqhamo sayo. Lowo utshintshe iinqanawa ngoku uphila kakuhle kungekho ngakoyika, kodwa ngenxa yothando lomntwana.

Kolose 1:13 · Yohane 1:12 · Yohane 3:3 · Efese 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ Ukuba umoni uziva enoxolo, esithi “uThixo undixolele,” lo gama lowo wonzakaliswayo esabandezeleka — ubabalo aluthengi-shiphu kakhulu?
s.faq.a3:
Umbuzo ufanelekile, yaye intlungu iyinyaniso. Kodwa intetho enjalo asikuko “ukuxolela kweBhayibhile” — kukugqwetha kona.

① Ukuxolela kukaThixo akuze kube shiphu. Isono asingqungqwa ngathi asizange senzeke; uThixo ngokwakhe wahlawula ixabiso laso ngobomi boNyana wakhe. Umnqamlezo asibobungqina bokuba isono sithathwa lula, kodwa bokuba isono sinzima kangakanani — kukuxolela okona kuxabisekileyo emhlabeni.

② Inguquko yokwenene ivelisa isiqhamo. Ukuba umoni uziphakamisa phambi kolowo wonzakalisiweyo — “uThixo undixolele, ngoko ndinoxolo” — leyo asiyonguquko kodwa kukuxelisa kona (Mateyu 3:8). Yaye ukuxolelana komntu noThixo akusicimi isilonda solowo wonzakalisiweyo nokumnyanzela ukuba axolele.

③ Isono asize siyekwe nje. Sonke isono sihlawulwa kwenye yeendawo ezimbini — okanye uKrestu asithwale emnqamlezweni (kwabo bamthembayo akukho kuyekugwetywa, Roma 8:1), okanye lowo umalayo ekugqibeleni asithwale ngokwakhe. Ngoko akukho “ulibalelo lushiphu.” Umoni naye usanoxanduva lwasemthethweni kweli hlabathi (Roma 13:1-4).

④ Iinyembezi zolowo wonzakalisiweyo azincinci kuThixo. UThixo ulila nababalilayo, ukhumbula inyembezi nganye, yaye uya kuzosula ngokwakhe ekugqibeleni (ISityhilelo 21:4). Ngoko olowo wonzakalisiweyo akanyanzelekanga ukuba athwale ubunzima bempindezelo yedwa, kodwa unganikela kuThixo olilungisa (Roma 12:19 — “Impindezelo yeyam, kuya kubuyekeza mna, itsho iNkosi”).

Mateyu 3:8 · Roma 8:1 · Roma 13:1-4 · ISityhilelo 21:4
s.respond.sub: Olu thando aluyolwazi kodwa sisimemo. Ukuba uthando olwabethelelwa esikhundleni sakho luchukumise intliziyo yakho, thandaza oku ngokucothayo, umgca ngamnye ngexesha.
s.respond.prayer:
Thixo,

ndiyavuma ukuba ndingumoni ongenako ukuzisindisa.

Ndiyakholwa ukuba uYesu wandifela emnqamlezweni waza wavuka kwakhona.

Nceda uxolele zonke izono zam, ukususela ngoku ube yiNkosi yobomi bam.

Ndamkele njengomntwana wakho, undenze ndiphile ubomi obutsha.

Egameni likaYesu ndiyathandaza. Amen.
s.respond.after: Ukuba uthandaze oku ngenyaniso, iBhayibhile ithi usube ngumntwana kaThixo. Awusekho wedwa — fumana ibandla elikufuphi uhambe indlela yokholo kunye nabanye.
s.respond.verse: “Kodwa bonke abâmamkeláyo, bezinikele kuye ngokupheleleyo, wabanika igunya lokuba ngabantwana bakaThixo.” — Yohane 1:12 · Roma 10:9-10
s.closing.verse: “Asikuko nakufa, nabomi … nditsho nasiphi na isidalwa, esiya kuba nako ukusahlula nothando lukaThixo olukuye uKrestu Yesu, iNkosi yethu.” — Roma 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
Phezu kweli bali, uMthetho, iiNcwadi zeMibongo, abaProfeti, neeleta zongeza “inyama.”
Ukususela ngoku, nokuba uvula yiphi na incwadi, uya kubona ukuba ukweyiphi indawo kweli bali.
s.about.line: Isekelwe kwimbono yembali-yenkululeko, evangeli · eyoHlaziyo eyabelwana ngayo ngamabandla amaninzi amaProtestanti aseKorea.

epochs.title: Ukudalwa
epochs.events: Iintsuku ezithandathu zokudala, uluntu lwadalwa ngokomfanekiso kaThixo, ukuphumla kweSabatha
epochs.christ: Ihlabathi ladalwa nge “Lizwi.” IVangeli kaYohane ivakalisa ukuba eli Lizwi nguYesu ngokwakhe (Yohane 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
IBhayibhile ayiqali ngengxoxo yefilosofi kodwa ngentetho: “Ekuqaleni uThixo…” Ihlabathi asiyongozi kodwa ngumsebenzi kaThixo ongumntu.

  • Umfanekiso kaThixo · kuzo zonke izidalwa, ngabantu kuphela abenziwe bafane noThixo — ukuze bamazi yaye banyamekele ihlabathi.
  • Ukuphumla · ukuphumla kosuku lwesixhenxe kubonisa yonke into igqibelele inoxolo (ishalom): “kwakulungile.”
  • I-Eden · ihlabathi phambi kokwaphuka kwalo, apho uThixo nabantu bahamba kunye.

epochs.title: Ukuwa
epochs.one: Isono sangena, lwaza lwaqhawuka unxibelelwano phakathi kwabantu noThixo.
epochs.events: Ukutya isiqhamo esalelweyo, ukugxothwa e-Eden, ukufika kokufa nokubulaleka
epochs.q: Ndiza kudala ubutshaba phakathi kwakho nomfazi … wena woyiluma isithende.
epochs.christ: Isithembiso sokuqala seVangeli, esanikwa kanye emva kokuWa: “inzala yomfazi” iya kuyicumza intloko yenyoka — yaye lowo nguYesu (Genesis 3:15; Roma 16:20; Galati 4:4).
epochs.detail:
Ngokungathobeli kokuzama “ukufana noThixo,” isono sangena ehlabathini. Umphumo asikoku kwaphula umthetho kuphela kodwa kukwaphuka kobudlelwane.

  • Unxibelelwano olwaphukileyo · noThixo (ukuzimela), nabanye (ukutyabeka ityala), nendalo (ameva nobunzima).
  • Ukufa · isilumkiso esithi “uya kufa nakanjani” siba yinyaniso.
  • Genesis 3:15 · kanti phakathi komgwebo, isithembiso sosindiso siza kuqala. Abafundi basibiza ngokuba yiprotoevangelium (ivangeli yokuqala).
epochs.next: Ngoku uThixo ubiza indoda enye ukuze aqalise usindiso…

epochs.title: Ooyisemkhulu
epochs.one: UThixo uthembisa uAbraham, “Uya kuba ngumjelo wesithsaba.”
epochs.events: Umnqophiso kaAbraham, ukubotshwa kukaIsake, oonyana abalishumi elinambini bakaYakobi, uYosefu unyukela elawulweni eYiputa
epochs.q: Ndiza kukunika inzala eninzi, eya kuba sisizwe esikhulu … Zonke izizwe zothamsanqeliswa ngawe.
epochs.christ: Isithembiso sokuba “zonke izizwe ziya kuthamsanqeliswa” sizaliseka kuYesu, inzala kaAbraham (Galati 3:16).
epochs.detail:
UThixo uqala ukuyilungisa ingxaki yabo bonke abantu ngokubiza indoda enye, uAbraham. Intliziyo yayo ngumnqophiso (isithembiso) — isizwe esikhulu, ilizwe, “nesithsaba kuzo zonke izizwe.”

  • Ukholo · uAbraham wasikholelwa isithembiso esingabonakaliyo, saza sabalelwa kuye njengobulungisa (Genesis 15:6).
  • UIsake noYakobi · isithembiso siyadlula; uYakobi (uSirayeli) uzala izizwe ezilishumi elinambini.
  • UYosefu · wathengiswa ngabantakwabo kodwa wanyuselwa elawulweni — “uThixo yena walijika elo yelenqe labubuhle” (Genesis 50:20).
epochs.next: Belandela uYosefu, intsapho yehlela eYiputa — yaza yaba ngamakhoboka…

epochs.title: UMphambili nentlango
epochs.one: UThixo wahlangula abantu ababengamakhoboka wabenza abakhe.
epochs.events: Izibetho ezilishumi, iPasika, ukuwela uLwandle oluBomvu, iMithetho eliShumi eSinayi, umnquba, iminyaka engama-40 entlango
epochs.q: Ndiya kunenza abantu bam, mna ndibe nguThixo wenu.
epochs.christ: IPasika — apho igazi lemvana laguqula ukufa — likalathela kuYesu, “imvana yethu yePasika,” owabethelelwa esikhundleni sethu (1 Korinte 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Olona sindiso lukhulu lweTestamente eNdala. USirayeli owayengamakhoboka ukhululwa ngamandla kaThixo aze enziwe abantu bakhe.

  • IPasika · indlu emakelwe ligazi lemvana iyatyhutshwa kukufa — umzekelo emva kwawo onke amadini alandelayo.
  • ULwandle oluBomvu · usindiso apho indlela iphela khona; “ukuwela” kuba ngumqondiso wesiqalo esitsha.
  • Umnqophiso waseSinayi · ngeMithetho bafunda ukuphila njengabantu bakaThixo.
  • Umnquba · indlu engcwele ehamba-hambayo apho uThixo ahlala phakathi kwabantu bakhe — ukungxama “kukaImanuweli.”
  • Iminyaka engama-40 · ukungathobeli kugcina isizukulwana siphamphatheka entlango, kanti uThixo uhleli ekufuphi nemana nentsika yelifu nomlilo.
epochs.next: Bemi emdeni welizwe lesithembiso, bazilungiselela ukungena…

epochs.title: Uloyiso nabaGwebi
epochs.one: Bafumana ilizwe, kodwa kungekho kumkani umntu ngamnye wenza unothanda.
epochs.people: UYoshuwa; abagwebi abafana noGidiyon noSamson; uRute
epochs.events: Ukuwa kweYeriko, ukuzinza eKanan, umjikelo ophindaphindekayo wesono–umgwebo–usindiso
epochs.q: Ke kaloku ngelo thuba kwakungekho kumkani kwaSirayeli; umntu ngamnye ke wayesenza unothanda.
epochs.christ: Kumnombo kaRute kuvela uDavide, naseluzalweni lukaDavide kuvela uYesu (Mateyu 1). Nasesiphithiphithini, umnombo kaMesiya uyaqhubeka.
epochs.detail:
Phantsi koYoshuwa bangena elizweni lesithembiso, kodwa emva kokuzinza bakhawuleza bamlibale uThixo. AbaGwebi yintshukumo enye ephindaphindwayo.

  • Umjikelo osezantsi · isono → ucinezelo → ukukhala → umgwebi uyahlangula → isono kwakhona. Kuya kuba kubi ngakumbi.
  • Abagwebi · uGidiyon, uSamson, uDebhora — abahlanguli bexeshana, abaqhawe kodwa abanezithubeli ezinkulu.
  • URute · ibali eliqaqambileyo lokuthembeka kwixesha elimnyama; umfazi wesinye isizwe ungena kumnombo kaDavide (nokaYesu).

epochs.title: UBukumkani obuManyeneyo
epochs.one: UThixo uthembisa uDavide, “Itrone yakho iya kuhlala ngonaphakade.”
epochs.events: Ukumkani wokuqala uSawule, uDavide noGoliyati, umnqophiso kaDavide, uSolomon wakha itempile
epochs.q: Indlu yakho ndiya kuyizinzisa, ubukumkani bakho buhlale buhleli, ulawulo lwakho luhlale ngonaphakade.
epochs.christ: “Itrone engunaphakade” izaliseka kuYesu, unyana kaDavide — kungoko abizwa ngokuba “nguNyana kaDavide” (Luka 1:32-33; Mateyu 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Incopho kaSirayeli, elawulwa ngookumkani abathathu.

  • USawule · ukumkani abamfunayo abantu; isiqalo esihle esonakaliswe kukungathobeli.
  • UDavide · “indoda engokwentliziyo kaThixo.” Woyisa uGoliyati aze enze iYerusalem ikomkhulu. Wenza isono esikhulu (uBhatishebha) kodwa uguquka ngentliziyo (iNdumiso 51).
  • Umnqophiso kaDavide (2 Samuweli 7) · uThixo uthembisa ukuyizinzisa indlu kaDavide ngonaphakade — ingcambu echaphazelekayo yethemba lobuMesiya.
  • USolomon · encotsheni yobulumko nobutyebi wakha itempile, kodwa ekupheleni kobomi waphethukela kwizithixo.

epochs.title: UBukumkani obuMahluleyo
epochs.one: Bahlulwa baba ngumzantsi (uYuda) nomntla (uSirayeli), isizwe sityibilikela entshabalalweni.
epochs.people: Ookumkani bezikumkani zombini; abaprofeti abafana noEliya, uIsaya, uYeremiya
epochs.events: Ubukumkani buyahlulwa, unqulo-zithixo lunwenwa, abaprofeti bayalumkisa
epochs.q: Unanamhla ke uSirayeli usavukelene nendlu kaDavide.
epochs.christ: Kweli xesha abaprofeti baxela uMesiya oza kuza ngokucacileyo ngokwandayo (Isaya 9:6; Isaya 53).
epochs.detail:
Ngemihla yonyana kaSolomon isizwe siyahlulwa: ubukumkani basemntla bakwaSirayeli (izizwe ezili-10, ikomkhulu iSamariya) nobukumkani basemzantsi bakwaYuda (izizwe ezi-2, ikomkhulu iYerusalem).

  • USirayeli (umntla) · onke ookumkani bakhonza izithixo; uwela kwa-Asiriya ngo-722 BC.
  • UYuda (umzantsi) · uluzalo lukaDavide luyaqhubeka, ngookumkani abambalwa abalungileyo abafana noHezekiya noYosiya, kodwa luyahla ngokubanzi.
  • Abaprofeti · uEliya, uAmosi, uIsaya, uYeremiya bakhala “buyani!” Isiprofeto sobuMesiya sifika encotsheni yaso apha (“isicaka esibandezelekayo” seIsaya 53).
epochs.next: Ekugqibeleni umgwebo owalunyukiswa ngawo uyeza — bathinjwa…

epochs.title: Ukuthinjwa
epochs.one: Isizwe siyadilika abantu batsalelwa emazweni asemzini.
epochs.events: USirayeli uwela kwa-Asiriya (722), uYuda uwela kwiBhabheli yaza yatshatyalaliswa itempile (586)
epochs.q: Ngasemilanjeni yaseBhabheli sahlala phantsi sagixa sakucinga *ngeZiyon.
epochs.christ: Ezinzulwini zonxunguphalo uYeremiya uthembisa “umnqophiso omtsha” (Yeremiya 31:31) — kanye loo mnqophiso uYesu awunqophisa kwiSidlo soKugqibela.
epochs.detail:
Izilumkiso ziyazaliseka. Itempile iyatsha abantu basiwa eBhabheli — belahlekelwa lilizwe, ukumkani, netempile: olona xesha lisezantsi kunazo zonke.

  • Ukuwa kabini · uSirayeli (Asiriya, 722 BC) noYuda (Bhabheli, 586 BC).
  • UDaniyeli · umzekelo wokholo nakwinkundla yabahedeni (umhadi weengonyama); ubona imibono “yobukumkani obungunaphakade” obuzayo.
  • Intlansi yethemba · umbono kaHezekile wamathambo omileyo aphilayo (Hezekile 37) “nomnqophiso omtsha” kaYeremiya bakalathela kwikamva ebumnyameni.
epochs.next: Emva kweminyaka engamashumi asixhenxe, uThixo uvula indlela — bayagoduka…

epochs.title: Ukubuya
epochs.one: Bayabuya baze bakhe kwakhona itempile neendonga.
epochs.events: Ukubuya ngommiselo kaKoreshi, ukwakhiwa kwetempile, ukulungiswa kweendonga zaseYerusalem, ukubuyiselwa kweLizwi
epochs.q: Kaloku uNdikhoyo uza kunomeleza ngovuyo lwakhe.
epochs.christ: UMalaki, incwadi yokugqibela yeTestamente eNdala, igqibezela ngokuxela isigidimi esiza kulungisa indlela kaMesiya: “Ndiyasithuma isigidimi sam” (Malaki 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Ngommiselo kakumkani wasePersi uKoreshi (538 BC) ukubuya kuyaqala. Ngamaza amathathu bayabuya baze bakhe kwakhona oko kwakonakele.

  • UZerubhabheli · wakha kwakhona itempile (yagqitywa ngo-516 BC).
  • UEzra · ufundisa iLizwi kwakhona aze avuselele ukholo.
  • UNehemiya · wakha kwakhona iindonga zaseYerusalem ngeentsuku ezingama-52.
  • UEstere · usindisa amaYuda asePersi entshabalalweni — “ngexesha elinjengeli.”
  • Ukunqwenela okusekhoyo · itempile imi, kodwa akukho kumkani onjengoDavide. Abantu balindele uMesiya.
epochs.next: Kwaza ke… ngokungathi izulu lithi cwaka, kwadlula iminyaka engama-400.

epochs.title: Iminyaka yokuThula
epochs.one: Iminyaka engama-400 ingekho lizwi lomprofeti — kanti indawo yokudlalela yayilungiswa ngokuthe cwaka.
epochs.events: IPersi → iGrike → inkululeko yamaMakabhi → ulawulo lwaseRoma
epochs.q: Kodwa ke lithe lakuzaliseka ixesha, uThixo wamthumela uNyana wakhe. Weza ngokuzalwa ngumntu obhinqileyo.
epochs.christ: Konke oku “kulungiswa kwendawo yokudlalela” kwakunguThixo esebenza ukuze uYesu eze kanye “ekuzalisekeni kwexesha.”
epochs.detail:
Ukususela kuMalaki kuse kwiTestamente eNtsha, kudlula iminyaka emalunga nama-400 kungekho siBhalo sitsha. Kanti emva kwembali uThixo wayelungisa indlela yeendaba ezilungileyo.

  • Ubukhosi buyatshintshana · iPersi → iGrike (uAleksandire, 333 BC) → amaPtolemy namaSeleukasi → uvukelo lwamaMakabhi (167 BC) → iRoma (63 BC).
  • IsiGrike · uloyiso lukaAleksandire lwenza isiGrike sibe lulwimi oluqhelekileyo; iTestamente eNdala iguqulelwe esiGrikini (iSeptuagint), kuvula indlela yeendaba ezilungileyo ukuba zinwenwe ngokukhawuleza.
  • Iindlela noxolo lwaseRoma · iindlela ezakhiwe kakuhle “noxolo lwamaRoma” baba ziindlela zobuvangeli.
  • Iisinagoge namaqela · imfundiso yasesinagogeni iyemiliselwa; abaFarisi nabaSadusi bayavela; nokunqwenela uMesiya kuyavuthwa.
epochs.next: Kwaza ke ukuthula kwaphuka — ekugqibeleni, uyeza.

epochs.title: UYesu uyeza
epochs.one: UMesiya owayethenjisiwe weza, wafa, waza wavuka kwakhona.
epochs.people: UYesu, abafundi abalishumi elinambini, uYohane uMbhaptizi
epochs.events: Ukwenziwa-mntu, ubulungiseleli bakhe nemfundiso nemimangaliso, ukufa emnqamlezweni, ukuvuka ngomhla wesithathu
epochs.q: ULizwi ke waba ngumntu, waza wahlala phakathi kwethu … obuphuphuma ububele nenyaniso.
epochs.christ: Inzala yomfazi (umboniso 2), isithsaba sikaAbraham (3), imvana yePasika (4), ukumkani ongunaphakade kaDavide (6), umnqophiso omtsha (8) — konke kuzaliseka kumntu omnye, uYesu: umProfeti, uMbingeleli, noKumkani wethu wokwenene.
epochs.detail:
Ukuthula kuyaphuka; lowo waThenjiswayo uyafika. IiVangeli ezine zingqina ngobomi bukaYesu, ukufa, novuko ngezimbo ezine.

  • Ukwenziwa-mntu · uThixo waba ngumntu (uImanuweli, “uThixo unathi”), kwindawo ephantsi yaseBhetelehem.
  • Ubulungiseleli · ufundisa ngobukumkani bukaThixo, aphilise abagulayo, abize aboni. “Lowo undibonileyo ubone uBawo.”
  • Umnqamlezo · uhlawula esikhundleni sethu ixabiso lesono nokufa okwabangelwa kukuWa (umboniso 2). Imvana yePasika yokwenene.
  • Uvuko · evuka ngomhla wesithathu, wophula amandla esono, ukufa, noSathana — kwasemnqamlezweni “uboyisile oomagunya nooziphathamandla … wabenza intlekisa” (Kolose 2:15).

Ngoko uYesu ngumProfeti wethu wokwenene (esibonisa indlela eya kuThixo), uMbingeleli wethu wokwenene (ecamagushela isono ngomzimba wakhe), noKumkani wethu wokwenene (eyoyisa isono, ukufa, noSathana aze alawule ngonaphakade).
epochs.next: UYesu ovukileyo uthumela abafundi bakhe ehlabathini…

epochs.title: Ibandla liyaqala
epochs.one: UMoya uyeza, neendaba ezilungileyo zinwenwa zise eziphelweni zomhlaba.
epochs.events: UMoya uthululwa ngePentekoste, ibandla liyazalwa, iindaba ezilungileyo zinwenwa zisuka eYerusalem zisiya eRoma ngentshutshiso
epochs.q: Nina niya kunikwa amandla, akufika kuni uMoya oyiNgcwele … kude kuse naseziphelweni zomhlaba.
epochs.christ: Eli bali lisaqhubeka nanamhlanje. IBhayibhile igqibezela ngokuthembisa ukuba uYesu uya kubuya enze zonke izinto zibe ntsha (ISityhilelo 21).
epochs.detail:
Emva kokunyukela kukaYesu ezulwini, uMoya owayethenjisiwe uyeza ngePentekoste laza labelu ibandla. Iindaba ezilungileyo zinwenwa ngokuqhushumbayo.

  • IPentekoste · uMoya wenza abafundi ababesoyika babe ngamangqina anesibindi.
  • UPetros · ushumayela iindaba ezilungileyo kumaYuda eYerusalem.
  • UPawulos · esuka kumtshutshisi waba ngumpostile, etyala amabandla kwilizwe leentlanga aze abhale iileta.
  • Kude kuse eziphelweni zomhlaba · iYerusalem → iYuda → iSamariya → iRoma. Isithembiso sikaAbraham “sezizwe zonke” siyazaliseka.
  • Nathi · ibali aliphezi; liqhubela phambili kukubuya kukaYesu nezulu elitsha nomhlaba omtsha.

epochs.title: Ukubuyiselwa
epochs.one: UYesu uyabuya enze zonke izinto zibe ntsha.
epochs.events: Ukubuya kwesibini, umgwebo wokugqibela, isiphelo sesono·sokufa·seenyembezi, izulu elitsha nomhlaba omtsha
epochs.q: Uya kubosula zonke iinyembezi. Akusayi kubuye kubekho kufa, nalusizi, nasikhalo, nazintlungu.
epochs.christ: I-Eden yendalo yokuqala iyabuyiselwa ekugqibeleni njenge “Yerusalem eNtsha.” UThixo uhlala nabantu bakhe ngonaphakade — ukuzaliseka kukaImanuweli (ISityhilelo 21:3; Mateyu 1:23).
epochs.detail:
IBhayibhile ayipheli ngexesha lebandla. Incwadi yayo yokugqibela, iSityhilelo, ibonisa uYesu ebuya ukuze agqibezele yonke into.

  • Ukubuya kwesibini · ukumkani owathenjiswayo ubuya ngozuko.
  • Uloyiso lokugqibela · uSathana nokufa boyiswa ngonaphakade, uKrestu alawule njengoKumkani wookumkani (1 Korinte 15:25-26; ISityhilelo 20:10).
  • Umgwebo novuko · konke okungalunganga kulungiswa, baze abafileyo bavuswe.
  • Izulu elitsha nomhlaba omtsha · isono, ukufa, iinyembezi, neentlungu kunyamalala ngonaphakade (ISityhilelo 21:4).
  • I-Eden ebuyiselweyo · kwi “Yerusalem eNtsha” engcono kunesiqalo, uThixo uhlala nabantu bakhe ngonaphakade — injongo le iBhayibhile iphela ikalathela kuyo.

Ngoko ngoku lixesha “lokuba sekukho, kodwa kungekafiki”: kuYesu usindiso selufikile, kodwa ukugqitywa kwalo kusalindelwe.
epochs.next: Ngoko ke eli bali lonke lithetha ntoni “kum”?

love: Ibali liqala kungekho ngomgwebo kodwa ngendalo ephuphuma uthando.
Ngomzuzu abantu bonayo, uThixo wathembisa usindiso kwangoko apho.
UThixo weza kuqala kwindoda engafanelekanga, wayibiza ngegama, wayenza umjelo wesithsaba.
Weva ukugcuma kwabantu ababengamakhoboka, wehla ngokwakhe ukuze abahlangule.
Bemngcatsha ngokuphindaphindiweyo, kanti rhoqo bakukhala wathumela umhlanguli wabaphakamisa.
Akazange amlahle nokuba uDavide owayewile, yaye ngaye wathembisa uKumkani ongunaphakade.
Kubantu ababemfulathele, waqhubeka ethumela abaprofeti, ebongoza, “Khanibuye ekhaya.”
Wehla nabo kwanasezweni elimnyama lokuthinjwa, waza wathembisa usindiso.
Nakubantu abasilelayo ngokuphindaphindiweyo, akazange asibuyise isithembiso sakhe.
Nasekuthuleni kweminyaka engama-400, engabonakali, wayelungisa indlela yosindiso.
Ngoxa sasiseyizoni, wathumela uNyana wakhe ukuba abeke phantsi ubomi bakhe.
Uthando esaluxhamlayo, ngoku uyaluthumela luqukuqele kulo lonke ihlabathi.
Ekugqibeleni uya kuzosula zonke iinyembezi aze abuyisele zonke izinto ngothando.

mis.w: “Kutheni uThixo wenza abantu abanokona? Bekungayi kuba ngcono ukuba akasenzanga konke konke?”
mis.t: UThixo wadala ihlabathi nabantu kungekuko ngenxa yokuswela kwakhe, kodwa ngenxa yothando oluphuphumayo. Ukwenza abantu babe ngabantu abanonxibelelwano noThixo luthando ngokwako. Yaye nokungena kwesono kwakungaphandle kwecebo likaThixo losindiso (Efese 1:4-5). Umboniso wokuqala weBhayibhile asingomgwebo kodwa luthando.

mis.w: “Ugxothwe waze wanikwa ukufa ngenxa nje yokutya isiqhamo esinye — uThixo akakhohlakali kakhulu?”
mis.t: Ukugxothwa e-Eden kwakungumgwebo nenceba kunye. Ukutya emthini wobomi uphile ngonaphakade kuloo meko yokwaphuka, yokwahlukana noThixo, kwakuya kuba kukubanjwa entlungwini ngonaphakade (Genesis 3:22). Ukuvumela ukufa kwavula indlela yokubuya, yaye kanye apho uThixo wathembisa umHlanguli (Genesis 3:15). Uthando lwaluselungaphakathi komgwebo.

mis.w: “UAbraham wanyulwa ngenxa yokuba wayenokholo olukhulu — ababalisi beBhayibhile bonke ngamaqhawe okuziphatha okuhle?”
mis.t: UAbraham wakhe waxoka waza wathandabuza; uYakobi wayengumkhohlisi. UThixo akabizanga “abafanelekileyo” kodwa wabiza abanezithubeli, ngobabalo. Isizathu sasingekuko ukulunga kwabo kodwa luthando oluthembekileyo lukaThixo (Duteronomi 7:7-8).

UThixo wabasindisa phambi kokunika umthetho. NeMithetho eliShumi iqala ngentetho yosindiso: “Mna Ndikhoyo ndinguThixo wenu onikhulule ebukhobokeni eJiputa” (Eksodus 6:7). Umthetho asikuko “wugcine ukuze usindiswe,” kodwa sisikhokelo sothando sokuba abantu abasele besindisiwe baphile njani (Duteronomi 7:7-9). Ubabalo luhlala luqala; ukuthobela yimpendulo.

mis.w: “Uloyiso lwaseKanan lwaluyimbubho engenanceba — ngoko uThixo weTestamente eNdala ngenene ukhohlakele.”
mis.t: Lo ngumcimbi onzima ongenakusonjululwa ngesivakalisi esinye. Kodwa iBhayibhile ayiwuvelisi njengogonyamelo olungenanjongo kodwa njengomgwebo emva kweenkulungwane zomonde ngakubo ububi obugqithisileyo (kuquka nokubingelela abantwana) (Genesis 15:16; Duteronomi 9:4-5; Levitikus 18:24-25). UThixo ucotha nokugweba, yaye wabamkela ngovuyo abo babuyela kuye — nokuba bezizizwe ezifana noRahabhi noRute (Yoshuwa 6:25; Rute 4:13-17).

mis.w: “UDavide wayeliqhawe elingenasithubeli — kungoko abizwa ngokuba ‘yindoda engokwentliziyo kaThixo.’”
mis.t: UDavide wakrexeza waza wabulala. “Indoda engokwentliziyo kaThixo” ayithethi engenasithubeli, kodwa ethetha lowo wayengasifihli isono sakhe — owaguqukayo ngokupheleleyo waza wahlala ebuyela kuThixo (iNdumiso 51). Uthando lukaThixo aluwalahli nawo lawo awa kabuhlungu.

mis.w: “Umprofeti ngumvumisi oxela ikamva / uThixo weTestamente eNdala unomsindo kuphela.”
mis.t: Intliziyo yomprofeti asikuko “ukuxela ikamva” kodwa sisibongozo esibuhlungu sikaThixo: “Khaibuye.” Nezilumkiso zomgwebo azijongelanga ukutshabalalisa kodwa ukubuyisa abantu nokubasindisa — “Andivuyiswa kukufa kongendawo” (Hezekile 33:11).

mis.w: “Ukuthinjwa kungqina ukuba uThixo wamlahla ngokupheleleyo uSirayeli.”
mis.t: Ukuthinjwa kwakungekuko ukulahlwa kodwa kwakuluqeqesho noluhlambuluko ngakumntwana othandwayo (Hebhere 12:6). UThixo akazange ahambe; wayenoDaniyeli embindini wokuthinjwa waza wathembisa, “izicwangciso zam ngani zokuba ndininike intlala-kahle ingabi bububi, ndinidalele ikamva nethemba” (Yeremiya 29:11).

mis.w: “Ekubeni kungazange kubekho lizwi iminyaka engama-400, uThixo wayehambile okanye ephumla.”
mis.t: Ukuthula akukukungabikho. Wayengathethi nje, lo gama lonke wayehambisa ubukhosi, iilwimi, neendlela ukuze alungise indawo yokudlalela yosindiso. Ngomzuzu olelona thuli, uThixo wayesebenza nzima ngakumbi, ngothando (Galati 4:4).

mis.w: “UYesu wayengomnye nje wabafundisi abalungileyo bokuziphatha / umnqamlezo wawukukoyiswa okulusizi.”
mis.t: UYesu wazibhengeza ukuba unguThixo ngokwakhe (Yohane 8:58), yaye umnqamlezo wawungengozi okanye kukoyiswa kodwa luthando olwacwangciswayo. Akazange arhuqelwe apho ngenkani; wabubeka phantsi ubomi bakhe ngokwakhe (Yohane 10:18). “Olona thando lukhulu umntu anokuzithanda ngalo izihlobo zakhe kukuba ubomi bakhe abuncamele zona.” (Yohane 15:13).

mis.w: “Ibandla liklabhu yabantu abagqibeleleyo, okanye sisakhiwo nje.”
mis.t: Ibandla asilolubuntu “lwabangcwele abagqibeleleyo” kodwa lwaboni abaxolelweyo. Nompostile uPawulos wazibiza ngokuba “ngobalaseleyo kuzoni” (1 Timoti 1:15). Ibandla lokuqala laliphikisana laze lakhubeka nalo (IZenzo 6:1; 1 Korinte 1:11). Asiyondawo yokuqhayisa, kodwa ngabantu abadlulisela uthando abaluxhamlayo (Yohane 13:34-35).

core.title: Isono sokuqala — akukho namnye olilungisa
core.body: Ingxaki asikuko “izenzo ezimbalwa ezimbi” kodwa yingcambu yentliziyo. Ukususela kuAdam, wonke umntu uzalwa ephantsi kwesono kwaye akanakufikelela kuThixo ngokwakhe.
core.vtext: Akukho namnye ulilungisa … Kaloku bonke bonile; bayalabalaba kubuqaqawuli ababulungiselelwe nguThixo.

core.title: Umthetho awunako ukundisindisa
core.body: Umthetho asingoleli kodwa sisipili. Okukhona uzama nzima, kokukhona ubonisa ukuba usilela kangakanani. Injongo yawo kukusikhokelela kuKrestu.
core.vtext: Into eyenziwa ngumthetho kukwazisa abantu ngesono … umthetho wawusigcine lo gama angekafiki uKrestu, ukuze sigwetyelwe.

core.title: Ngobabalo — sisipho, hayi imigudu
core.body: Usindiso asingomvuzo wokulunga okuziqokeleleyo, kodwa sisipho sasimahla kwabo bangakufanelekanga. Ngoko akukho mntu unokuziqhayisa.
core.vtext: Nakhululwa ngesisa sikaThixo ngokholo; anikhululwanga ngemizamo yenu … akukho nto ubani angaziqhayisa ngayo.

core.title: Sigwetyelwa ngokholo
core.body: Kungekuko ngokugcina umthetho, kodwa ngokukholwa kuYesu Krestu, sivakaliswa singamalungisa — sambathiswa kungekuko ubulungisa bethu kodwa obakhe.
core.vtext: Njengoko sikholwa, sígwetyelwe nguThixo … umntu akenziwa abe lilungisa nguThixo ngenxa yokuba esenza okufunwa *ngumthetho kaMosis; kuphela kungokuzinikela kuYesu Krestu.

core.title: IBhayibhile ikalatha kuYesu
core.body: IBhayibhile asiyoncwadi yamadoda amakhulu okanye yokuzinceda. Ukususela kuGenesis kuse kwiSityhilelo, iphepha ngalinye lingqina ngomntu omnye — uYesu Krestu.
core.vtext: Zona zingqina ngam … Wabachazela kuzo zonke *iziBhalo iindawo ezithetha ngaye.

core.title: UBukumkani bukaThixo — umyalezo ophambili kaYesu
core.body: Umxholo uYesu awawufundisa kunazo zonke. Ulawulo lukaThixo njengoKumkani lwangena kweli hlabathi noYesu luze lugqitywe ekubuyeni kwakhe. Ngomnqamlezo novuko lwakhe, uYesu nguKumkani wokwenene owoyisa isono, ukufa, noSathana.
core.vtext: Lifikile ngoku ixesha. Luthwasile ulawulo lukaThixo. Guqukani, nikholwe kuzo ezi ndaba zimnandi.

core.title: IiNdaba eziLungileyo — yena wakugqiba konke
core.body: Ityala lesono endingenako ukulihlawula, uYesu walihlawula esikhundleni sam emnqamlezweni, yaye ngokuvuka woyisa ukufa. Andiyami kwi“yenza oku” kodwa kwi“kugqityiwe.”
